criteria_checked.note: Change is decision-complete: exact banner string, exact section title, exact insertion anchors (handoff between 'Fail-closed checklist' L44 and 'Anti-token-max reminder' L49 — both confirmed present and adjacent). Minor: memo anchor 'directly after the intro line' is a 2-physical-line wrapped paragraph (L3-4); banner lands after L4.

BLOCKER-1: AC2/Verification-row-2 grep is case-sensitive `grep 'fresh'` but the specified body text (Proposed Changes 'a') writes 'FRESH-CONTEXT' uppercase with no lowercase 'fresh' token — a faithful implementation returns 0 and spuriously FAILS the fail-closed verifier. Also 'contains ONLY + hunks' is imprecise: a pure-insertion git diff includes space-prefixed context lines; restate as 'no `-` lines except the file header'.

All grounded facts re-verified 2026-07-09: memo UNTRACKED (git status `??`), AGENTS.md = 24,126 B (not 32,490), stale claims confirmed at memo L7-10 and risk #6 L60, v1.0.5 shas 1cdb357/cbcfb2f exist + MILESTONES L763 records 32,490→24,126 B, run status = RUN-NO-ACTIVE, branch = claude/dmc-fable-core, verdict validate|gate present, Art. VIII escalation duty at Constitution VIII.1/VIII.4 verbatim.
Both edit targets exist. scope-guard.sh:154-163 evidence/verification exemption confirmed (exits 0). roles.json critic-falsifier = fresh-context/may_mutate:false. No phantom paths.

Envelope ratification recorded this session; 'docs-only cannot move selftest' holds — bin/dmc selftest passes now (schemas 15/0, legacy 4/0) and selftest's linkcheck is --self-test embedded fixtures, not the real tree.

2-file mutation scope well-pinned; records paths scope-exempt. ADVISORY: working tree has a pre-existing unrelated ` M .codex/config.toml` — plan must instruct targeted `git add <paths>` (never -A). The name-only==2-files AC catches it but the executor is not warned.

Docs-only, no secrets, no migration. Memo is trackable (git check-ignore: NOT ignored). No hidden coupling from tracking .harness/plans: linkcheck scans only 3 pointer docs + 24 files (NOT plans), selftest/CI (dmc-ci.yml) do not enumerate plans. The handoff IS a linkchecked pointer doc, so the new section's dmc-verb/schema-path/role-binding refs are gated by the required `bin/dmc linkcheck` — a genuine strength of the plan.
LOCAL-only commits on dedicated branch claude/dmc-fable-core, no push — trivially reversible via git. Inherent but not explicitly stated in the plan.

blockers.statement: AC2 and Verification-Commands row 2 use case-sensitive `grep 'fresh'`, but the section body specified in Proposed Changes writes only 'FRESH-CONTEXT' (uppercase). A verbatim implementation fails its own acceptance grep, spuriously tripping the fail-closed verifier. Resolve by either specifying `grep -i 'fresh'` or requiring a lowercase 'fresh' token in the body.
